envelopes.title: Envelope 2 — Strike Price
revealedTexts: You pay ₹100 per share to exercise
Before you see a single rupee of profit
reactionOptions: Fair — I'm buying at founder price
Risky — what if company value drops

envelopes.title: Envelope 4 — Liquidity
revealedTexts: Cannot sell until: IPO or acquisition
Average time to IPO in India: 8-10 years
You will be waiting almost a decade
reactionOptions: Fine — I'm playing the long game
That's a long time to wait
Need to check secondary sale options

envelopes.title: Envelope 5 — Tax
revealedTexts: Tax event 2: Sale → capital gains tax

slider.question: Rate your confidence in this offer now

multipleChoice.question: What's the one thing you'd ask the founder before signing?

options.text: Can I see last 6 months burn rate?
What happens to ESOPs if acquired?
